pr.title: Add testing skill for Weather App
pr.body:
Adds a SKILL.md file documenting how to test the Weather App end-to-end, including dev server setup, key test scenarios for timezone handling, search debounce, and known issues.

Devin Session: https://app.devin.ai/sessions/f6c75d564bc041188d34105902065d9f
pr.author: devin-ai-integration[bot]
